revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Commonscat|19th-century architecture|19th-century architecture}} [[19世紀]]の[[建築]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{Catlink|18世紀の建築|20世…」
空調・生活の快適性などが含まれ芸術作品ではありますが、「美術工芸品」ではないです。
Moved [[Category:19th-century works]] to Buildings subcat

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:19世紀の建築]] [[ar:Category:عمارة القرن 19]] [[az:Category:XIX əsr memarlığı]] [[ba:Category:XIX быуат архитектураһы]] [[be_x_old:Category:Архітэктура XIX стагодзьдзя]] [[be:Category:Архітэктура XIX стагоддзя]] [[bs:Category:Arhitektura u 19. vijeku]] [[commons:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[cv:Category:XIX ĕмĕрти архитектура]] [[cy:Category:Pensaernïaeth y 19eg ganrif]] [[de:Category:Erbaut im 19. Jahrhundert]] [[el:Category:Αρχιτεκτονική του 19ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 19-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XIX]] [[eu:Category:XIX. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۹ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XIXe siècle]] [[hy:Category:19-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[id:Category:Arsitektur abad ke-19]] [[ko:Category:19세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 19 век]] [[mn:Category:19-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nn:Category:Arkitektur på 1800-talet]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1800-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XIX]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XIX-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XIX века]] [[simple:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 19. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 19. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1800-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 19]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[tt:Category:XIX гасыр архитектурасы]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XIX століття]] [[ur:Category:انیسویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:19世纪建筑]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Edo_period_architecture]].

Jahrhundert]] [[el:Category:Αρχιτεκτονική του 19ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 19-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XIX]] [[eu:Category:XIX. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۹ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XIXe siècle]] [[hy:Category:19-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[id:Category:Arsitektur abad ke-19]] [[ko:Category:19세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 19 век]] [[mn:Category:19-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nn:Category:Arkitektur på 1800-talet]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1800-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XIX]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XIX-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XIX века]] [[simple:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 19. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 19. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1800-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 19]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[tt:Category:XIX гасыр архитектурасы]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XIX століття]] [[ur:Category:انیسویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:19世纪建筑]] [[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]]

Jahrhundert]] [[el:Category:Αρχιτεκτονική του 19ου αιώνα]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 19-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XIX]] [[eu:Category:XIX. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۹ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XIXe siècle]] [[hy:Category:19-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[id:Category:Arsitektur abad ke-19]] [[ko:Category:19세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 19 век]] [[mn:Category:19-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nn:Category:Arkitektur på 1800-talet]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1800-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XIX]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XIX-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XIX века]] [[simple:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 19. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 19. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1800-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 19]] [[tr:Category:19. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[tt:Category:XIX гасыр архитектурасы]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XIX століття]] [[ur:Category:انیسویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:19世纪建筑]] [[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

Bot: restore translated version

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

{{Commons category}} {{navseasoncats}}

[[en:Category:19th-century architecture]][[en:Category:19th-century architecture]][[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[en:Category:19th-century architecture]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7160214)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=19th-century_architecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
